text:
Uplines and Lock-offs 101
Shibari Study describes this free course by Gorgone as teaching how to attach uplines to limbs or harnesses and multiple lock-off methods for suspension lines. The page catalogs related topics including safety, weight handling, basic anchoring, upper and lower lock-offs, bamboo and carabiner lock-offs, and Y-hanger or epsilon configurations. The site describes its instruction as fully clothed, consent-driven adult education focused on technique, communication, connection, and safe practice.
title: Free Shibari Tutorial for Uplines and Lock-offs
